feed.title: Nirman Darpan — Himachal Pradesh public works
feed.subtitle: Independent civic-transparency tracker. Status, budgets, accountability records and press coverage for 32 public-works projects across all 12 HP districts.

entry.title: Chandigarh–Shimla 4-Lane Highway (NH-5)
entry.summary: Roads & highways · Solan · Shimla · Active · behind schedule · 68% complete · ₹3,475 Cr outlay. Widening of the 92 km Parwanoo–Solan–Shimla corridor to four lanes with bypasses, viaducts and tunnels to cut travel time and reduce landslide closures.

entry.title: Kiratpur–Nerchowk 4-Lane (NH-21)
entry.summary: Roads & highways · Bilaspur · Mandi · Active · on track · 85% complete · ₹4,750 Cr outlay. Four-laning of 92 km of NH-21 between Kiratpur (Punjab) and Nerchowk (Mandi) — shortens the Chandigarh–Manali route by ~46 km, with the country’s tallest highway viaduct over the Bhakra reservoir.

entry.title: Bhanupli–Bilaspur–Beri Broad Gauge Rail
entry.summary: Bridges & tunnels · Bilaspur · Active · behind schedule · 28% complete · ₹6,800 Cr outlay. A strategically important 63 km broad-gauge line from Bhanupli (Punjab) to Bilaspur — the first leg of a long-planned rail link toward Leh. Tunnel-heavy and slow-moving on land acquisition.

entry.title: Renukaji Multipurpose Dam
entry.summary: Power & hydro · Sirmaur · Active · behind schedule · 34% complete · ₹7,000 Cr outlay. A 148 m dam on the Giri river primarily to augment drinking water supply to Delhi, with a 40 MW power component. Tied up in land acquisition and rehabilitation.

entry.title: Luhri Stage-I Hydroelectric Project
entry.summary: Power & hydro · Shimla · Kullu · Active · on track · 52% complete · ₹1,810 Cr outlay. A 210 MW run-of-river project on the Sutlej spanning the Shimla–Kullu border, designed to feed clean power to the northern grid.

entry.title: Kangra (Gaggal) Airport Expansion
entry.summary: Tourism infrastructure · Kangra · Active · behind schedule · 22% complete · ₹3,300 Cr outlay. Runway extension from 1,376 m to 3,010 m to allow larger aircraft for the Dharamshala tourism circuit. Stalled by acquisition of land across several villages.

entry.title: Mandi Greenfield Airport (Balh Valley)
entry.summary: Tourism infrastructure · Mandi · Active · behind schedule · 6% complete · ₹1,100 Cr outlay. A planned greenfield airport in the Balh valley intended to relieve Kullu–Bhuntar and Kangra–Gaggal and unlock central Himachal tourism. Currently in site-clearance and acquisition planning.

entry.title: Atal Tunnel, Rohtang
entry.summary: Bridges & tunnels · Lahaul-Spiti · Completed · 100% complete · ₹3,300 Cr outlay. A 9.02 km highway tunnel under the Rohtang Pass giving year-round access to the Lahaul valley — among the world’s longest road tunnels above 10,000 ft.

entry.title: AIIMS Bilaspur
entry.summary: Hospitals & health · Bilaspur · Completed · 100% complete · ₹1,470 Cr outlay. A 750-bed tertiary-care institute at Kothipura under PMSSY, bringing super-specialty care and a medical college to the lower Himalayan belt.

entry.title: IIT Mandi (Kamand campus)
entry.summary: Schools & education · Mandi · Completed · 100% complete · ₹1,010 Cr outlay. Permanent campus of the Indian Institute of Technology Mandi at Kamand on the Uhl river — has anchored research, deep-tech incubation, and skilled employment in the central hill belt.

entry.title: Jal Jeevan Mission — Himachal household taps
entry.summary: Water & sanitation · Statewide · Active · on track · 95% complete · ₹9,520 Cr outlay. Centrally-sponsored mission delivering a functional household tap connection to every rural family in Himachal — one of the first hill states to cross 95% coverage and pursuing full Har Ghar Jal certification.

entry.title: Greater Shimla Smart City Mission
entry.summary: Tourism infrastructure · Shimla · Active · on track · 72% complete · ₹2,900 Cr outlay. Smart Cities Mission projects across the Shimla Planning Area — heritage restoration, multi-level parking, NMT corridors, an integrated command-and-control centre, and Mall Road infrastructure upgrades.

entry.title: Parbati-II Hydroelectric Project (800 MW)
entry.summary: Power & hydro · Kullu · Completed · 100% complete · ₹13,045 Cr outlay. An 800 MW (4×200 MW) run-of-river scheme diverting the Parbati near Pulga through a ~31.5 km headrace tunnel to a powerhouse at Siund in Kullu — one of NHPC’s most delayed projects after severe Himalayan geology, finally commissioned in 2025.

entry.title: Dhaulasidh Hydroelectric Project (66 MW)
entry.summary: Power & hydro · Hamirpur · Kangra · Active · behind schedule · 85% complete · ₹688 Cr outlay. A 66 MW run-of-river project on the Beas on the Hamirpur–Kangra boundary, built on BOOM basis to add ~304 million units a year to the northern grid.

entry.title: Koldam Hydroelectric Power Station (800 MW)
entry.summary: Power & hydro · Bilaspur · Mandi · Completed · 100% complete · ₹4,527 Cr outlay. An 800 MW (4×200 MW) run-of-river project with a ~167 m rockfill dam on the Sutlej near Barmana in Bilaspur — NTPC’s first hydropower station, generating roughly 3,050 GWh a year.

entry.title: Pinjore–Baddi–Nalagarh 4-Lane (NH-105)
entry.summary: Roads & highways · Solan · Active · behind schedule · 45% complete · ₹598 Cr outlay. Four-laning of the ~36 km Pinjore–Baddi–Nalagarh corridor (17 km in HP) serving the Baddi–Barotiwala–Nalagarh industrial belt. Stalled for about a year after the original contractor quit citing land and utility-shifting delays, then revived with a fresh ₹598 cr clearance.

entry.title: Pathankot–Mandi 4-Lane (NH-154)
entry.summary: Roads & highways · Kangra · Mandi · Active · behind schedule · 45% complete · ₹8,000 Cr outlay. Upgradation of the ~219 km Pathankot–Mandi corridor to four lanes, split into multiple packages. Progress is highly uneven — some packages near complete while the Palampur–Padhar stretch was held up for years awaiting a DPR.

entry.title: Shinku La Tunnel
entry.summary: Bridges & tunnels · Lahaul-Spiti · Active · behind schedule · 12% complete · ₹1,681 Cr outlay. A ~4.1 km twin-tube tunnel beneath the Shinku La pass (~16,580 ft), set to become the world’s highest road tunnel — giving all-weather strategic connectivity from Lahaul to Zanskar and eastern Ladakh.

entry.title: Jalori Jot Tunnel (NH-305)
entry.summary: Bridges & tunnels · Kullu · Active · on track · 5% complete · ₹1,452 Cr outlay. A tunnel beneath the snow-bound Jalori Pass on NH-305 to give year-round connectivity to the inner Seraj/Anni belt of Kullu, sanctioned with a ₹1,452 cr central nod in 2025.

entry.title: Atal Institute of Medical Super-Specialities, Chamiyana
entry.summary: Hospitals & health · Shimla · Completed · 100% complete · ₹262 Cr outlay. Himachal’s first standalone government super-specialty institute, with around 324 beds across ten super-specialty departments (neurology, cardiology, nephrology, urology, gastroenterology and more), built at Chamiyana on the Shimla outskirts under PMSSY-III.

entry.title: Dharamshala Smart City Mission
entry.summary: Tourism infrastructure · Kangra · Active · behind schedule · 88% complete · ₹567 Cr outlay. Smart Cities Mission works across Dharamshala — smart roads, rooftop solar, an integrated command-and-control centre, CCTV, e-municipality, parking and water-supply upgrades — delivered through repeated deadline extensions.

entry.title: Shimla Water Supply Augmentation (Sutlej Lift)
entry.summary: Water & sanitation · Shimla · Active · on track · 81% complete · ₹709 Cr outlay. A World Bank–backed scheme lifting 67 MLD from the Sutlej at Sunni to end Shimla’s chronic summer water crisis after the 2018 shortage.

entry.title: Mandi–Kullu 2023 Flood Road Restoration
entry.summary: Disaster recovery · Mandi · Kullu · Active · on track · 74% complete · ₹1,240 Cr outlay. Rebuilding of national & state highways, bridges and link roads washed out in the July 2023 floods across the Beas valley — restoring connectivity to cut-off villages.

entry.title: Govt. School STEM Modernisation Cluster
entry.summary: Schools & education · Hamirpur · Una · Completed · 100% complete · ₹185 Cr outlay. Smart classrooms, science & computer labs and accessibility upgrades across 120 government schools in Hamirpur and Una districts.

entry.title: Shongtong Karcham Hydroelectric Project (450 MW)
entry.summary: Power & hydro · Kinnaur · Active · behind schedule · 75% complete · ₹2,113 Cr outlay. A 450 MW (3×150 MW) run-of-river project with an underground powerhouse on the Satluj in Kinnaur, upstream of Karcham Wangtoo — an HPPCL flagship long delayed past its 2017 target and now pushed toward a 2026 deadline.

entry.title: Bajoli Holi Hydroelectric Project (180 MW)
entry.summary: Power & hydro · Chamba · Completed · 100% complete · ₹2,205 Cr outlay. A 180 MW (3×60 MW) run-of-river-with-pondage plant on the upper Ravi near Holi in Chamba, with a 16+ km headrace tunnel — commissioned in 2022 after a multi-year delay and supplying green power including to Delhi airport.

entry.title: Pekhubela Solar Power Project (32 MW)
entry.summary: Power & hydro · Una · Completed · 100% complete · ₹220 Cr outlay. Himachal’s first major solar park — a 32 MW ground-mounted plant over about 49 hectares at Pekhubela in Una, with 82,656 modules expected to generate roughly 6.6 crore units a year. Built in around four months and dedicated in 2024.

entry.title: Dr. Radhakrishnan Govt. Medical College, Hamirpur
entry.summary: Hospitals & health · Hamirpur · Active · behind schedule · 90% complete · ₹417 Cr outlay. Medical college sanctioned in 2014 and operational from 2018 with 120 MBBS seats. Its permanent ~250-bed campus at Jol Sapper near Nadaun is under construction, with completion targeted for March 2026 after cost escalation to ₹417 cr.

entry.title: Dr. Y. S. Parmar Govt. Medical College, Nahan
entry.summary: Hospitals & health · Sirmaur · Active · behind schedule · 70% complete · ₹289 Cr outlay. The largest healthcare facility in Sirmaur, established in 2016 with 120 MBBS seats and a functional OPD and ~320-bed IPD. Permanent campus and diagnostic upgrades have lagged amid construction delays.

entry.title: Shimla Urban Ropeway
entry.summary: Tourism infrastructure · Shimla · Active · behind schedule · 6% complete · ₹1,734 Cr outlay. A 13.79 km urban ropeway with around 15 stations across Shimla — billed as the world’s second-largest — intended to relieve the town’s chronic traffic congestion, financed 80% by the New Development Bank. Still in tendering and pre-construction.

entry.title: Solan Old Bus Stand Redevelopment
entry.summary: Tourism infrastructure · Solan · Active · on track · 42% complete · ₹46 Cr outlay. Rebuild of the cramped old bus stand into a multi-storey terminal with shopping arcade, parking, and accessible boarding bays — meant to ease the Mall Road bottleneck.

entry.title: PMGSY-III Hamirpur Link Roads Cluster
entry.summary: Roads & highways · Hamirpur · Active · on track · 60% complete · ₹38 Cr outlay. 36 km of all-weather link roads to remote panchayats across Bhoranj, Bijhri and Dhatwal blocks under PMGSY-III — restoring monsoon-resilient road access to roughly 22 villages.
